description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker.io/dummertrottel/openjdk-17-ubuntu image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS. Define three stages (sanitychecks, build, test) with a global before_script that runs apt update, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to pwd/tmp/.gradle, and makes gradlew executable. In the sanitychecks stage add a licensecheck job that runs apt install --yes licensecheck git then ./licensecheck.sh, a validateI18N job that installs fonttools then runs ./validateI18N.sh, and a validate_images job that installs imagemagick then runs ./scripts/validate-images.sh. In the build stage add a build_desktop job that runs ./gradlew desktop:dist and publishes desktop/build/libs/ as artifacts, and a build_release job with its own before_script exporting GRADLE_USER_HOME, setting ANDROID_HOME, creating the directory, installing cmdline tools via setup_cmdline_tools.sh, updating PATH, making gradlew executable, then running ./gradlew assembleRelease and ./gradlew assembleDebug, publishing android/build/outputs/ as artifacts. In the test stage add a unit_tests job that echoes "skipped" and stores tests/build/reports/ as artifacts, while caching tmp/.gradle/wrapper and tmp/.gradle/caches across jobs.
